scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:backend:win: cd backend && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup: npm install && (npm run setup:backend || npm run setup:backend:win) && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
